brcm.name: brcm
brcm.description: The Building Resistance-Capacitance Modeling (BRCM) Matlab Toolbox facilitates the physical modeling of buildings for MPC. The Toolbox provides a means for the fast generation of (bi-)linear resistance-capacitance type models from basic geometry, construction and building systems data and also supports the generation of appropriate costs and constraints. The Toolbox is based on previously validated modeling principles.

hashtable.name: hashtable
hashtable.description: The matlab wrapper for the java class LinkedHashMap Java utility.

matwebsocks.name: matwebsocks
matwebsocks.description: Run "matws_install" to put the necessary libraries to the static Java path. Then restart matlab.

mpt3lowcom.name: mpt3lowcom
mpt3lowcom.description: Low-complexity control design module for MPT3

qpspline.name: qpspline
qpspline.description: The QPspline solver is an implementation of a spline algorithm to solve strictly convex feasible QP. The solver requires HashTable class to be installed.

rls-identification.name: rls-identification
rls-identification.description: Recursive Least Squares algorithm for system parameter identification

tbxcli.name: tbxcli
tbxcli.description: Matlab command line interface to tbxmanager's REST API
